verdict: Paid Instagram is spending heavily on awareness with only 23 purchases this period — efficiency is the problem.
diagnosis: Cost per purchase ran roughly $301 this period against 23 purchases and 607 pixel leads, signaling a top-of-funnel campaign starved of conversion focus.

signals.headline: Only 23 purchases this period
signals.detail: Paid Instagram drove 23 purchases against 607 pixel leads. The funnel leaks badly between lead capture and checkout.

signals.headline: Cost per purchase near $301
signals.detail: Average cost per purchase landed around $301 this period. Too high for a subscription box unless lifetime value is proven.

signals.headline: 1,137 landing page views, 23 carts
signals.detail: Roughly 2% of landing page viewers added to cart. Product page or pricing friction is the likely bottleneck.

signals.headline: 576 Google reviews, no new ones
signals.detail: Strong review base but zero new reviews captured this period. A dormant local asset that should be feeding trust.

signals.headline: Awareness campaign paused mid-period
signals.detail: The Premium Box Awareness campaign shows a paused status. Spend pacing and learning phase are likely disrupted.

benchmark.label: BENCHMARK
benchmark.body: Food and beverage stores lead all verticals this year. Billy Doe's roughly 2% landing-page-to-cart rate sits well below category norm, suggesting product page and offer clarity need work.

seasonal.label: SEASONAL
seasonal.subheader: Summer grilling drives peak meat demand
seasonal.body: June kicks off the grilling season — the strongest natural demand window for DTC meat. Underspending on conversion-focused campaigns now means missing the year's most efficient buying moment.

competitor.label: COMPETITOR
competitor.body: ButcherBox passed $500M in 2024 sales on a structured subscription model. Good Ranchers leans on American sourcing and free shipping. Billy Doe's halal-American angle is differentiated but underused in ads.

recommendations.title: Shift spend from awareness to purchase objective
recommendations.detail: Consider reallocating budget from the paused awareness campaign into a conversion-objective campaign targeting recent site visitors and cart abandoners during grilling season.

recommendations.title: Test product page and checkout for cart friction
recommendations.detail: With only 23 carts from 1,137 landing page views, worth exploring pricing clarity, shipping cost display, and a simpler box configurator on the main subscription page.

recommendations.title: Reactivate Google reviews to support paid trust
recommendations.detail: Test a post-purchase email or SMS asking for a Google review. 576 reviews is an asset — fresh ones lift both local search and ad credibility.
